children.text: If someone's asking you to do something you're uncomfortable with, you don't have to grin and bear it. Lodge a complaint -- with them, with yourself, even with a third party, if that seems appropriate. Make it official, or at least make a crystal-clear statement about what exactly is bothering you and how you'd like to see it be different. Sometimes saying it is enough to set the process of change in motion.

Don't just take a nap-- plan some serious rejuvenation. Consider a de-stressing walk, followed by a refreshing home manicure and aromatherapy bubble bath. Then, once you've stuck to the itinerary, you can take that nap!
Strange things seem to crop up at every turn, even in your relationship. You don't know quite what to make of it, but you've got to admit that you're a bit excited by the intrigue.
There's a lot going on underneath the surface at work that will end up confusing you if you try to think about it too hard. Don't worry about it and you'll figure it out in a few days.

The upside to the bottom line you're staring at is that it is inspiring you to make some necessary and overdue changes. Put a shot of excitement into what you have to do and you'll have the perfect concoction for success. Once you give yourself over to it, you're more than halfway there.

You are not alone on Monday. You have your troops behind you at every juncture. You are powerful, although you are choosing to exert your power in benevolent, beneficent ways. Tuesday and Wednesday are unexpectedly complicated days, and you get a bit disoriented in the maelstrom, but by Thursday you'll be sailing toward smoother waters and clearer skies. Friday is also sunny -- metaphorically and perhaps literally -- which everyone seems to interpret as a reflection on you. Saturday and Sunday, you may be sidetracked by someone else's needs, but you're happy to exercise compassion.

Make sure you read all the tiny print on the back of your ticket. As the week begins you'll need to pay attention to details to avoid any misunderstandings or mishaps. (A little caution on the road can go a long way.) Tuesday and Wednesday are both excellent days for going somewhere previously unexplored or for connecting with someone new, so don't be bashful about wandering somewhere unfamiliar. Blaze a trail with that famous friendliness of yours! On Thursday and Friday take some time to process what you've seen and done, even at the expense of covering more ground. This weekend, get a bunch of people together for a group outing.

Getting your romantic agenda to mesh with someone else's may be a bit of a challenge as the week begins. First things first: Get what you want clear in your head. Then consider getting it on the table! Thursday and Friday offer singletons a sweet opportunity that might arrive in an unexpected package, while the coupled up should sincerely open up to their mate. Why be aloof when you can be entirely engaged? This weekend, though, you might feel that wearing your heart on your sleeve just leaves you too exposed. Maybe a little mystery's in order.

Put a personal issue aside on Monday and build healthy working relationships. Your attitude will impress as well as work wonders. If you're curious about your future in your current position around Tuesday or Wednesday, schedule a one-on-one and get to the bottom of it. Come prepared with your accomplishments and specific ambitions. Then, toward the end of the workweek, some expansive energy comes into your work sphere -- ownership of a project, perhaps, or an important new connection. Discipline yourself this weekend -- but that means finding a balance instead of being a workaholic.

Why struggle against the flow on the 2nd and 3rd? It's clear that what's going to happen is going to happen, and you're much happier floating along with the current than against it. There is some self-sacrifice to getting what you want on the 9th and 10th, but you're no stranger to hard work and effort. Once you're in a good position to finally see the finish line, you're sure to win the race. A sizzling hot meetup lights up your universe on the 17th or 18th, and suddenly you're looking at the world as a whole new place. Maybe you aren't the most romantic sign but you're walking on air right now. Talk about having a one-track mind! You draw from experience on the 22nd and 23rd when you find yourself in a very similar situation you've been in before, and it may be so similar that you feel like you're having deja vu. Don't repeat the same mistakes you made last time. You're an expert networker on the 27th and 28th, and if you have anything to sell, this is the time. Make sure the price is right before all parties sign on the dotted line.

If you have more energy than you know what to do with, well, you do know what to do with it! Be as motivated as you are energetic. Any leftover nervous energy gets poured into your workout. Right? Start right away on the 1st and have a great run or walk. Or, a great dance or aerobics class in the evening. Party time! Be energetic on the 3rd and 4th, too. If the winter weather is no fun, there's the treadmill or workout video. Be disciplined on the 10th and have a powerful weight room session, or swim or run farther or longer. Indulge yourself on the 11th with a solid but modified workout, then maybe hot tub time. Feeling good? Good. Join a big class on the 13th, dance or yoga, but leave promptly. You need your rest. Research healthy holiday dishes and desserts on the 15th and decide what you want to eat. Go skiing, or finish shopping on the 17th and 18th. If you're moving, it's exercise. Get your exercise in early on the 24th and 25th and be there for friends, family, and holiday feasts. Repeat on the 31st. Or perhaps you'll be out dancing 2016 away. Happy, healthy New Year!

For Aquarians, love is something that needs to combine the best of romance and friendships. During this month, you'll have a chance to have both. On the 1st, you'll feel like you hit the dating jackpot. An expansive aspect has you surrounded by potential dating partners - so fun! Single Aquarius natives are drinking in all the positive attention. Meanwhile, those already in relationships may find that an aspect on the 3rd allows you to feel like you're making progress. This is especially true in the realm of communication around the 12th. Say what you need to say, with true compassion in your heart. By the Full Moon of the 13th, you may be filled with new ideas about how to grow your relationship. You're a thinker, after all! Luckily, you and your partner are on the same page about most of it. Making big life steps together is featured on the 24th and 25th, when holiday plans may involve getting engaged, moving in together, or just chatting about your long-term plans. Enjoy it all in each other's company! Though tensions could arise around the 28th, the New Moon of the 29th fosters unity, affection and stability for the two of you.

You stir up new interest with new details, and that is an exciting development. You couldn't ask for a better set of cosmic connections with which to end the year. There are favorable opportunities between the 1st and 2nd. A bit of a challenge however, would be the strings attached to the gifts. You'll have to negotiate them, and the best time to do that would be between the 3rd and 4th. These are your lucky days. However, it is a weekend, but make plans under fortunate stars. You still job-hunt and send resumes with good vibes. Be more assertive between the 6th and 7th when some things have be asked point blank. Show your versatility between the 12th and 13th when there are benefits in your creative ideas. Look for logical explanations from the 19th through the 21st. An exciting development surfaces in the significant and practical reason someone did something. The 26th through the 30th are good financially, with a freedom them in general. It isn't often we can use the word "spectacular" but the times are good. You also enjoy another lucky day, or actually evening on the 30th. Next month, old forms are destroyed apropos of the start of the New Year.
